scope_note: UChicago does not publish a minimum GPA cutoff here. This panel instead summarizes how the transcript is reviewed on the official required-materials page.
policy_summary: UChicago does not publish a minimum GPA. Instead, it reviews the transcript across all four years to see whether students challenged themselves productively and did well in the courses available at their school.

what_mit_does_say.claim: UChicago says the transcript serves as a roadmap of the applicant’s academic path across all four years of high school.
UChicago considers the transcript in the context of the high school’s offerings and opportunities.
